name: Market Scanner
description: Scans competitive landscape and differentiators. Has limited data and requires one RETRY with instructions to broaden the analysis scope.

checks.fail: ❌ No market research docs — analysis will be LLM-inferred only

checks.prompt: Analyse the competitive landscape for this MVP: (1) name 3 direct competitors with their key differentiators, (2) identify 2 underserved market gaps, (3) the MVP's unique angle in one sentence. Context: {retryContext}
